channel.title: Comments for page "Facetious Fanatics"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Facetious Fanatics"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
In unison, they lifted their arms and held them away from each other, parallel to the ground. Still as one, they side-stepped toward one another, sweeping their arms until their fingertips almost touched. They flung their arms away from each other, still parallel to the ground, but this time kicked their opposite knees toward each other. They stamped their feet out and leaned into each other, slamming their knuckles together with their fingers outstretched.

Wait, did they just… do the fusion dance? XD

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I am de spy, slap my hand. No? Sacré bleu. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Not only that.
Seems like the golem is (Or is molded to be) specifically SCP-701-1…

Did they try to give it a body?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Did they really? Did they really just use a golem to perform The Hanged King's Play? Oh, those stupid buggers.

item.title: Re: Author's Notes
item.content:encoded: I'd never seen 845 before, I had no idea Everett was actually a skip! :D

item.title: Author's Notes
item.content:encoded:
Stage five of Are We Consecrated Yet? is up and running. Big thanks to Deveraux, thedeadlymoose, djkaktus, KateMcTiriss, MacLeod, Kalinin and maybe someone else I dunno for reading this through the various stages.

References!
Everett, the magical ferret/polecat - SCP-845
Uncle Larry's (Good Eatin') - SCP-785
"Magic thing" - SCP-113
The golems, again - SCP-2300
"Red Bear Bob's Food Truck" - SCP-1838
The play - SCP-701

Already writing the finale of this arc (the next tale), so hopefully it won't be too big a gap this time.
